text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is looking a bit down, so I go
and check on her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your concern, Trainer. I have been
worried about abnormalities on my skin.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, it is not a problem. This can be solved
by changing out my skin parts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. That was a "robot joke," if you will.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I attempted to assuage your concerns with a joke,
but I failed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Currently detecting a shift in status to despair. I
have determined that the cause is rough skin.

Unfortunately, it looks like her skin troubles are
affecting more than just her skin.
